title: bupleurum falcatum subsp. persicum
intro: Bupleurum falcatum subsp. persicum, also known as Persian knotted hard bupleurum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, due to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Bupleurum falcatum subsp. persicum include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as improving liver function and overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions, infusions, and dried forms, and is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to balance the body's energy and promote relaxation.
